modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error message when logging into SNAP portal.

full_description_text: 
The user is encountering an error message after logging into the SNAP portal. The message states, "We're Sorry... We couldn't find your home page," and indicates a "Constituency Redirect Incomplete" issue. This problem occurs across all browsers while trying to access the portal at https://experience.usd.edu. The user is unable to navigate to their intended destination due to this error.
